class BetaManagedAgentsSessionErrorEvent: вА¶оВЪ

An error event indicating a problem occurred during session execution.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

оА™

error: ErrorоВЪ

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

One of the following:

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError: вА¶оВЪ

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

message: strоВЪ

Human-readable error description.

оА™

retry\_status: RetryStatusоВЪ

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying: вА¶оВЪ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: Literal["retrying"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted: вА¶оВЪ

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: Literal["exhausted"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal: вА¶оВЪ

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: Literal["terminal"]оВЪ

type: Literal["unknown\_error"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEvent: вА¶оВЪ

An interrupt event that pauses agent execution and returns control to the user.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

type: Literal["user.interrupt"]оВЪ

processed\_at: Optional[datetime]оВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: Optional[str]оВЪ

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent: вА¶оВЪ

A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

оА™

result: Literal["allow", "deny"]оВЪ

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

"allow"оВЪ

"deny"оВЪ

tool\_use\_id: strоВЪ

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: Literal["user.tool\_confirmation"]оВЪ

deny\_message: Optional[str]оВЪ

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

processed\_at: Optional[datetime]оВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: Optional[str]оВЪ

When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.

оА™

type: Literal["user.custom\_tool\_result"]оВЪ

оА™

content: Optional[List[Content]]оВЪ

The result content returned by the tool.

class BetaManagedAgentsAgentCustomToolUseEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Event emitted when the agent calls a custom tool. The session goes idle until the client sends a `user.custom_tool_result` event with the result.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

input: Dict[str, object]оВЪ

Input parameters for the tool call.

name: strоВЪ

Name of the custom tool being called.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: Literal["agent.custom\_tool\_use"]оВЪ

session\_thread\_id: Optional[str]оВЪ

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its custom tool use on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.custom_tool_result` event to route the result back.

оА™

type: Literal["agent.message"]оВЪ

class BetaManagedAgentsAgentMCPToolUseEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Event emitted when the agent invokes a tool provided by an MCP server.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

input: Dict[str, object]оВЪ

Input parameters for the tool call.

mcp\_server\_name: strоВЪ

Name of the MCP server providing the tool.

name: strоВЪ

Name of the MCP tool being used.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: Literal["agent.mcp\_tool\_use"]оВЪ

оА™

evaluated\_permission: Optional[Literal["allow", "ask", "deny"]]оВЪ

AgentEvaluatedPermission enum

One of the following:

"allow"оВЪ

"ask"оВЪ

"deny"оВЪ

session\_thread\_id: Optional[str]оВЪ

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its permission request on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.tool_confirmation` event to route the approval back.

class BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolUseEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Event emitted when the agent invokes a built-in agent tool.

Unique identifier for this event.

Input parameters for the tool call.

Name of the agent tool being used.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: Literal["agent.tool\_use"]оВЪ

оА™

evaluated\_permission: Optional[Literal["allow", "ask", "deny"]]оВЪ

AgentEvaluatedPermission enum

One of the following:

"allow"оВЪ

"ask"оВЪ

"deny"оВЪ

session\_thread\_id: Optional[str]оВЪ

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its permission request on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.tool_confirmation` event to route the approval back.

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionErrorEvent: вА¶оВЪ

An error event indicating a problem occurred during session execution.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

оА™

error: ErrorоВЪ

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

One of the following:

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError: вА¶оВЪ

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

message: strоВЪ

Human-readable error description.

оА™

retry\_status: RetryStatusоВЪ

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying: вА¶оВЪ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: Literal["retrying"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted: вА¶оВЪ

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: Literal["exhausted"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal: вА¶оВЪ

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: Literal["terminal"]оВЪ

type: Literal["unknown\_error"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionStatusIdleEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Indicates the agent has paused and is awaiting user input.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

оА™

stop\_reason: StopReasonоВЪ

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

One of the following:

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn: вА¶оВЪ

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

type: Literal["end\_turn"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction: вА¶оВЪ

The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

event\_ids: List[str]оВЪ

The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

type: Literal["requires\_action"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted: вА¶оВЪ

The turn ended because the retry budget was exhausted (`max_iterations` hit or an error escalated to `retry_status: 'exhausted'`).

type: Literal["retries\_exhausted"]оВЪ

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadCreatedEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Emitted when a subagent is spawned as a new thread. Written to the parent thread's output stream so clients observing the session see child creation.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

agent\_name: strоВЪ

Name of the callable agent the thread runs.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: strоВЪ

Public `sthr_` ID of the newly created thread.

type: Literal["session.thread\_created"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle begins.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: intоВЪ

0-indexed revision cycle. 0 is the first evaluation; 1 is the re-evaluation after the first revision; etc.

outcome\_id: strоВЪ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: Literal["span.outcome\_evaluation\_start"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle completes. Carries the verdict and aggregate token usage. A verdict of `needs_revision` means another evaluation cycle follows; `satisfied`, `max_iterations_reached`, `failed`, or `interrupted` are terminal вАФ no further evaluation cycles follow.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

explanation: strоВЪ

Human-readable explanation of the verdict. For `needs_revision`, describes which criteria failed and why.

iteration: intоВЪ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_evaluation\_start\_id: strоВЪ

The id of the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` event.

outcome\_id: strоВЪ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

result: strоВЪ

Evaluation verdict. 'satisfied': criteria met, session goes idle. 'needs\_revision': criteria not met, another revision cycle follows. 'max\_iterations\_reached': evaluation budget exhausted with criteria still unmet вАФ one final acknowledgment turn follows before the session goes idle, but no further evaluation runs. 'failed': grader determined the rubric does not apply to the deliverables. 'interrupted': user sent an interrupt while evaluation was in progress.

type: Literal["span.outcome\_evaluation\_end"]оВЪ

оА™

usage: [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md)оВЪ

Token usage for a single model request.

cache\_creation\_input\_tokens: intоВЪ

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

cache\_read\_input\_tokens: intоВЪ

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

input\_tokens: intоВЪ

Input tokens consumed by this request.

output\_tokens: intоВЪ

Output tokens generated by this request.

оА™

speed: Optional[Literal["standard", "fast"]]оВЪ

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

"standard"оВЪ

"fast"оВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

оА™

model\_usage: [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md)оВЪ

Token usage for a single model request.

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

Input tokens consumed by this request.

"fast"оВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Periodic heartbeat emitted while an outcome evaluation cycle is in progress. Distinguishes 'evaluation is actively running' from 'evaluation is stuck' between the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` and `span.outcome_evaluation_end` events.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: intоВЪ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_id: strоВЪ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: Literal["span.outcome\_evaluation\_ongoing"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

description: strоВЪ

What the agent should produce. Copied from the input event.

max\_iterations: Optional[int]оВЪ

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

outcome\_id: strоВЪ

Server-generated `outc_` ID for this outcome. Referenced by `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events and the session's `outcome_evaluations` list.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

оА™

rubric: RubricоВЪ

Rubric for grading the quality of an outcome.

One of the following:

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsFileRubric: вА¶оВЪ

Rubric referenced by a file uploaded via the Files API.

file\_id: strоВЪ

ID of the rubric file.

type: Literal["file"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsTextRubric: вА¶оВЪ

Rubric content provided inline as text.

content: strоВЪ

Rubric content. Plain text or markdown вАФ the grader treats it as freeform text.

type: Literal["text"]оВЪ

type: Literal["user.define\_outcome"]оВЪ

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionDeletedEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Emitted when a session has been deleted. Terminates any active event stream вАФ no further events will be emitted for this session.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: Literal["session.deleted"]оВЪ

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadStatusRunningEvent: вА¶оВЪ

A session thread has begun executing. Emitted on the thread's own stream and cross-posted to the primary stream for child threads.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

agent\_name: strоВЪ

Name of the agent the thread runs.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: strоВЪ

Public sthr\_ ID of the thread that started running.

type: Literal["session.thread\_status\_running"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadStatusIdleEvent: вА¶оВЪ

A session thread has yielded and is awaiting input. Emitted on the thread's own stream and cross-posted to the primary stream for child threads.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

agent\_name: strоВЪ

Name of the agent the thread runs.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: strоВЪ

Public sthr\_ ID of the thread that went idle.

оА™

stop\_reason: StopReasonоВЪ

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

One of the following:

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn: вА¶оВЪ

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

type: Literal["end\_turn"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction: вА¶оВЪ

The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

event\_ids: List[str]оВЪ

The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

type: Literal["requires\_action"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted: вА¶оВЪ

The turn ended because the retry budget was exhausted (`max_iterations` hit or an error escalated to `retry_status: 'exhausted'`).

type: Literal["retries\_exhausted"]оВЪ

type: Literal["session.thread\_status\_idle"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadStatusTerminatedEvent: вА¶оВЪ

A session thread has terminated and will accept no further input. Emitted on the thread's own stream and cross-posted to the primary stream for child threads.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

agent\_name: strоВЪ

Name of the agent the thread runs.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: strоВЪ

Public sthr\_ ID of the thread that terminated.

type: Literal["session.thread\_status\_terminated"]оВЪ

The model that will power your agent.

See [models](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/models-overview) for additional details and options.

- `claude-fable-5` - Next generation of intelligence for the hardest knowledge work and coding problems
- `claude-opus-4-8` - Frontier intelligence for long-running agents and coding
- `claude-opus-4-7` - Frontier intelligence for long-running agents and coding
- `claude-opus-4-6` - Most intelligent model for building agents and coding
- `claude-sonnet-4-6` - Best combination of speed and intelligence
- `claude-haiku-4-5` - Fastest model with near-frontier intelligence
- `claude-haiku-4-5-20251001` - Fastest model with near-frontier intelligence
- `claude-opus-4-5` - Premium model combining maximum intelligence with practical performance

- `claude-sonnet-4-5` - High-performance model for agents and coding
- `claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929` - High-performance model for agents and coding

One of the following:

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsAlwaysAllowPolicy: вА¶оВЪ

Tool calls are automatically approved without user confirmation.

type: Literal["always\_allow"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsAlwaysAskPolicy: вА¶оВЪ

Tool calls require user confirmation before execution.

type: Literal["always\_ask"]оВЪ

mcp\_server\_name: strоВЪ

type: Literal["mcp\_toolset"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsCustomTool: вА¶оВЪ

A custom tool as returned in API responses.

description: strоВЪ

оА™

JSON Schema for custom tool input parameters.

type: Literal["object"]оВЪ

properties: Optional[Dict[str, object]]оВЪ

required: Optional[List[str]]оВЪ

name: strоВЪ

type: Literal["custom"]оВЪ

type: Literal["agent"]оВЪ

version: intоВЪ

metadata: Optional[Dict[str, str]]оВЪ

The session's full metadata bag after the update. Present when the update set non-empty metadata; absent when metadata was unchanged or cleared to empty.

title: Optional[str]оВЪ

The session's new title. Present only when the update changed it.

class BetaManagedAgentsSystemMessageEvent: вА¶оВЪ

A mid-conversation system message event. Carries system-role content that is appended to the session as a `role: "system"` turn.

Unique identifier for this event.

оА™

content: List[[BetaManagedAgentsSystemContentBlock](api/beta.md)]оВЪ

System content blocks. Text-only.

type: Literal["system.message"]оВЪ

processed\_at: Optional[datetime]оВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction: вА¶оВЪ

The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

event\_ids: List[str]оВЪ

The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

type: Literal["requires\_action"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted: вА¶оВЪ

The turn ended because the retry budget was exhausted (`max_iterations` hit or an error escalated to `retry_status: 'exhausted'`).

type: Literal["retries\_exhausted"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelRequestEndEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Emitted when a model request completes.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

is\_error: Optional[bool]оВЪ

Whether the model request resulted in an error.

model\_request\_start\_id: strоВЪ

The id of the corresponding `span.model_request_start` event.

оА™

model\_usage: [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md)оВЪ

Token usage for a single model request.

cache\_creation\_input\_tokens: intоВЪ

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

cache\_read\_input\_tokens: intоВЪ

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

input\_tokens: intоВЪ

Input tokens consumed by this request.

output\_tokens: intоВЪ

Output tokens generated by this request.

оА™

speed: Optional[Literal["standard", "fast"]]оВЪ

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

"standard"оВЪ

"fast"оВЪ

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: Literal["span.model\_request\_end"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelRequestStartEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Emitted when a model request is initiated by the agent.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: Literal["span.model\_request\_start"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage: вА¶оВЪ

Token usage for a single model request.

cache\_creation\_input\_tokens: intоВЪ

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

cache\_read\_input\_tokens: intоВЪ

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

input\_tokens: intоВЪ

Input tokens consumed by this request.

output\_tokens: intоВЪ

Output tokens generated by this request.

оА™

speed: Optional[Literal["standard", "fast"]]оВЪ

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

"standard"оВЪ

"fast"оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle completes. Carries the verdict and aggregate token usage. A verdict of `needs_revision` means another evaluation cycle follows; `satisfied`, `max_iterations_reached`, `failed`, or `interrupted` are terminal вАФ no further evaluation cycles follow.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

explanation: strоВЪ

Human-readable explanation of the verdict. For `needs_revision`, describes which criteria failed and why.

iteration: intоВЪ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_evaluation\_start\_id: strоВЪ

The id of the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` event.

outcome\_id: strоВЪ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

result: strоВЪ

Evaluation verdict. 'satisfied': criteria met, session goes idle. 'needs\_revision': criteria not met, another revision cycle follows. 'max\_iterations\_reached': evaluation budget exhausted with criteria still unmet вАФ one final acknowledgment turn follows before the session goes idle, but no further evaluation runs. 'failed': grader determined the rubric does not apply to the deliverables. 'interrupted': user sent an interrupt while evaluation was in progress.

type: Literal["span.outcome\_evaluation\_end"]оВЪ

оА™

usage: [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md)оВЪ

Token usage for a single model request.

cache\_creation\_input\_tokens: intоВЪ

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

cache\_read\_input\_tokens: intоВЪ

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

input\_tokens: intоВЪ

Input tokens consumed by this request.

output\_tokens: intоВЪ

Output tokens generated by this request.

оА™

speed: Optional[Literal["standard", "fast"]]оВЪ

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

"standard"оВЪ

"fast"оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Periodic heartbeat emitted while an outcome evaluation cycle is in progress. Distinguishes 'evaluation is actively running' from 'evaluation is stuck' between the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` and `span.outcome_evaluation_end` events.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: intоВЪ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_id: strоВЪ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: Literal["span.outcome\_evaluation\_ongoing"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle begins.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: intоВЪ

0-indexed revision cycle. 0 is the first evaluation; 1 is the re-evaluation after the first revision; etc.

outcome\_id: strоВЪ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: Literal["span.outcome\_evaluation\_start"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEvent: вА¶оВЪ

An interrupt event that pauses agent execution and returns control to the user.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

type: Literal["user.interrupt"]оВЪ

processed\_at: Optional[datetime]оВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

class BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent: вА¶оВЪ

A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

оА™

result: Literal["allow", "deny"]оВЪ

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

"allow"оВЪ

"deny"оВЪ

tool\_use\_id: strоВЪ

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: Literal["user.tool\_confirmation"]оВЪ

deny\_message: Optional[str]оВЪ

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

processed\_at: Optional[datetime]оВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: Optional[str]оВЪ

When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsAgentCustomToolUseEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Event emitted when the agent calls a custom tool. The session goes idle until the client sends a `user.custom_tool_result` event with the result.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

input: Dict[str, object]оВЪ

Input parameters for the tool call.

name: strоВЪ

Name of the custom tool being called.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: Literal["agent.custom\_tool\_use"]оВЪ

session\_thread\_id: Optional[str]оВЪ

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its custom tool use on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.custom_tool_result` event to route the result back.

оА™

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

"deny"оВЪ

class BetaManagedAgentsAgentToolUseEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Event emitted when the agent invokes a built-in agent tool.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

input: Dict[str, object]оВЪ

Input parameters for the tool call.

name: strоВЪ

Name of the agent tool being used.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: Literal["agent.tool\_use"]оВЪ

оА™

evaluated\_permission: Optional[Literal["allow", "ask", "deny"]]оВЪ

AgentEvaluatedPermission enum

One of the following:

"allow"оВЪ

"ask"оВЪ

"deny"оВЪ

session\_thread\_id: Optional[str]оВЪ

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its permission request on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.tool_confirmation` event to route the approval back.

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionErrorEvent: вА¶оВЪ

An error event indicating a problem occurred during session execution.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

оА™

error: ErrorоВЪ

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

One of the following:

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError: вА¶оВЪ

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

message: strоВЪ

Human-readable error description.

оА™

retry\_status: RetryStatusоВЪ

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying: вА¶оВЪ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: Literal["retrying"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted: вА¶оВЪ

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: Literal["exhausted"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal: вА¶оВЪ

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: Literal["terminal"]оВЪ

type: Literal["unknown\_error"]оВЪ

оА™

Unique identifier for this event.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: Literal["session.status\_rescheduled"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionStatusRunningEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Indicates the session is actively running and the agent is working.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: Literal["session.status\_running"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionStatusIdleEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Indicates the agent has paused and is awaiting user input.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

оА™

stop\_reason: StopReasonоВЪ

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

One of the following:

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn: вА¶оВЪ

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

type: Literal["end\_turn"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction: вА¶оВЪ

The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

event\_ids: List[str]оВЪ

The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

type: Literal["requires\_action"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted: вА¶оВЪ

The turn ended because the retry budget was exhausted (`max_iterations` hit or an error escalated to `retry_status: 'exhausted'`).

type: Literal["retries\_exhausted"]оВЪ

type: Literal["session.status\_idle"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionStatusTerminatedEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Indicates the session has terminated, either due to an error or completion.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: Literal["session.status\_terminated"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadCreatedEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Emitted when a subagent is spawned as a new thread. Written to the parent thread's output stream so clients observing the session see child creation.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

agent\_name: strоВЪ

Name of the callable agent the thread runs.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: strоВЪ

Public `sthr_` ID of the newly created thread.

type: Literal["session.thread\_created"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle begins.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: intоВЪ

0-indexed revision cycle. 0 is the first evaluation; 1 is the re-evaluation after the first revision; etc.

outcome\_id: strоВЪ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: Literal["span.outcome\_evaluation\_start"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle completes. Carries the verdict and aggregate token usage. A verdict of `needs_revision` means another evaluation cycle follows; `satisfied`, `max_iterations_reached`, `failed`, or `interrupted` are terminal вАФ no further evaluation cycles follow.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

explanation: strоВЪ

Human-readable explanation of the verdict. For `needs_revision`, describes which criteria failed and why.

iteration: intоВЪ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_evaluation\_start\_id: strоВЪ

The id of the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` event.

outcome\_id: strоВЪ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

result: strоВЪ

Evaluation verdict. 'satisfied': criteria met, session goes idle. 'needs\_revision': criteria not met, another revision cycle follows. 'max\_iterations\_reached': evaluation budget exhausted with criteria still unmet вАФ one final acknowledgment turn follows before the session goes idle, but no further evaluation runs. 'failed': grader determined the rubric does not apply to the deliverables. 'interrupted': user sent an interrupt while evaluation was in progress.

type: Literal["span.outcome\_evaluation\_end"]оВЪ

оА™

usage: [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md)оВЪ

Token usage for a single model request.

cache\_creation\_input\_tokens: intоВЪ

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

cache\_read\_input\_tokens: intоВЪ

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

input\_tokens: intоВЪ

Input tokens consumed by this request.

output\_tokens: intоВЪ

Output tokens generated by this request.

оА™

speed: Optional[Literal["standard", "fast"]]оВЪ

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

"standard"оВЪ

"fast"оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Periodic heartbeat emitted while an outcome evaluation cycle is in progress. Distinguishes 'evaluation is actively running' from 'evaluation is stuck' between the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` and `span.outcome_evaluation_end` events.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: intоВЪ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_id: strоВЪ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: Literal["span.outcome\_evaluation\_ongoing"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

description: strоВЪ

What the agent should produce. Copied from the input event.

max\_iterations: Optional[int]оВЪ

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

outcome\_id: strоВЪ

Server-generated `outc_` ID for this outcome. Referenced by `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events and the session's `outcome_evaluations` list.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

оА™

rubric: RubricоВЪ

Rubric for grading the quality of an outcome.

One of the following:

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionThreadStatusIdleEvent: вА¶оВЪ

A session thread has yielded and is awaiting input. Emitted on the thread's own stream and cross-posted to the primary stream for child threads.

Unique identifier for this event.

Name of the agent the thread runs.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

Public sthr\_ ID of the thread that went idle.

оА™

stop\_reason: StopReasonоВЪ

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

One of the following:

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionEndTurn: вА¶оВЪ

The agent completed its turn naturally and is ready for the next user message.

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionRequiresAction: вА¶оВЪ

The agent is idle waiting on one or more blocking user-input events (tool confirmation, custom tool result, etc.). Resolving all of them transitions the session back to running.

event\_ids: List[str]оВЪ

The ids of events the agent is blocked on. Resolving fewer than all re-emits `session.status_idle` with the remainder.

type: Literal["requires\_action"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionRetriesExhausted: вА¶оВЪ

type: Literal["retries\_exhausted"]оВЪ

type: Literal["session.thread\_status\_idle"]оВЪ

The model that will power your agent.

See [models](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/models-overview) for additional details and options.

- `claude-fable-5` - Next generation of intelligence for the hardest knowledge work and coding problems
- `claude-opus-4-8` - Frontier intelligence for long-running agents and coding
- `claude-opus-4-7` - Frontier intelligence for long-running agents and coding
- `claude-opus-4-6` - Most intelligent model for building agents and coding
- `claude-sonnet-4-6` - Best combination of speed and intelligence
- `claude-haiku-4-5` - Fastest model with near-frontier intelligence
- `claude-haiku-4-5-20251001` - Fastest model with near-frontier intelligence
- `claude-opus-4-5` - Premium model combining maximum intelligence with practical performance
- `claude-opus-4-5-20251101` - Premium model combining maximum intelligence with practical performance
- `claude-sonnet-4-5` - High-performance model for agents and coding
- `claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929` - High-performance model for agents and coding

class BetaManagedAgentsSystemMessageEvent: вА¶оВЪ

A mid-conversation system message event. Carries system-role content that is appended to the session as a `role: "system"` turn.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

оА™

content: List[[BetaManagedAgentsSystemContentBlock](api/beta.md)]оВЪ

System content blocks. Text-only.

text: strоВЪ

The text content.

type: Literal["text"]оВЪ

type: Literal["system.message"]оВЪ

processed\_at: Optional[datetime]оВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSystemMessageEventParams: вА¶оВЪ

Privileged context for the accompanying turn and all subsequent turns, appended to the session's system context as a `role: "system"` turn rather than replacing the top-level system prompt. At most one per request: it must be the final event and immediately follow the `user.message`, `user.tool_result`, or `user.custom_tool_result` it accompanies. Only supported on models that accept mid-conversation system messages.

оА™

content: List[[BetaManagedAgentsSystemContentBlock](api/beta.md)]оВЪ

System content blocks to append. Text-only.

text: strоВЪ

The text content.

type: Literal["text"]оВЪ

type: Literal["system.message"]оВЪ

class BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError: вА¶оВЪ

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

message: strоВЪ

Human-readable error description.

оА™

retry\_status: RetryStatusоВЪ

What the client should do next in response to this error.

One of the following:

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying: вА¶оВЪ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

type: Literal["retrying"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted: вА¶оВЪ

This turn is dead; queued inputs are flushed and the session returns to idle. Client may send a new prompt.

type: Literal["exhausted"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusTerminal: вА¶оВЪ

The session encountered a terminal error and will transition to `terminated` state.

type: Literal["terminal"]оВЪ

type: Literal["unknown\_error"]оВЪ

оА™

Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

What the agent should produce. Copied from the input event.

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

Server-generated `outc_` ID for this outcome. Referenced by `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events and the session's `outcome_evaluations` list.

class BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEvent: вА¶оВЪ

An interrupt event that pauses agent execution and returns control to the user.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

type: Literal["user.interrupt"]оВЪ

processed\_at: Optional[datetime]оВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: Optional[str]оВЪ

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

class BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEventParams: вА¶оВЪ

session\_thread\_id: Optional[str]оВЪ

class BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent: вА¶оВЪ

A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

оА™

result: Literal["allow", "deny"]оВЪ

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

"allow"оВЪ

"deny"оВЪ

tool\_use\_id: strоВЪ

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: Literal["user.tool\_confirmation"]оВЪ

deny\_message: Optional[str]оВЪ

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

processed\_at: Optional[datetime]оВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: Optional[str]оВЪ

When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEventParams: вА¶оВЪ

Parameters for confirming or denying a tool execution request.

оА™

result: Literal["allow", "deny"]оВЪ

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

"allow"оВЪ

"deny"оВЪ

tool\_use\_id: strоВЪ

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: Literal["user.tool\_confirmation"]оВЪ

deny\_message: Optional[str]оВЪ

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

оА™

description: Optional[str]оВЪ

Description of the memory store, snapshotted at attach time. Rendered into the agent's system prompt. Empty string when the store has no description.

instructions: Optional[str]оВЪ

Per-attachment guidance for the agent on how to use this store. Rendered into the memory section of the system prompt. Max 4096 chars.

Filesystem path where the store is mounted in the session container, e.g. /mnt/memory/user-preferences. Derived from the store's name. Output-only.

Display name of the memory store, snapshotted at attach time. Later edits to the store's name do not propagate to this resource.

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionThread: вА¶оВЪ

An execution thread within a `session`. Each session has one primary thread plus zero or more child threads spawned by the coordinator.

оА™

Literal["claude-fable-5", "claude-opus-4-8", "claude-opus-4-7", 8 more]оВЪ

The model that will power your agent.

See [models](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/models-overview) for additional details and options.

- `claude-fable-5` - Next generation of intelligence for the hardest knowledge work and coding problems
- `claude-opus-4-8` - Frontier intelligence for long-running agents and coding
- `claude-opus-4-7` - Frontier intelligence for long-running agents and coding
- `claude-opus-4-6` - Most intelligent model for building agents and coding
- `claude-sonnet-4-6` - Best combination of speed and intelligence
- `claude-haiku-4-5` - Fastest model with near-frontier intelligence
- `claude-haiku-4-5-20251001` - Fastest model with near-frontier intelligence
- `claude-opus-4-5` - Premium model combining maximum intelligence with practical performance
- `claude-opus-4-5-20251101` - Premium model combining maximum intelligence with practical performance
- `claude-sonnet-4-5` - High-performance model for agents and coding
- `claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929` - High-performance model for agents and coding

ephemeral\_1h\_input\_tokens: Optional[int]оВЪ

Tokens used to create 1-hour ephemeral cache entries.

ephemeral\_5m\_input\_tokens: Optional[int]оВЪ

Tokens used to create 5-minute ephemeral cache entries.

cache\_read\_input\_tokens: Optional[int]оВЪ

Total tokens read from prompt cache.

input\_tokens: Optional[int]оВЪ

Total input tokens consumed across all turns.

output\_tokens: Optional[int]оВЪ

Total output tokens generated across all turns.

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsUserInterruptEvent: вА¶оВЪ

An interrupt event that pauses agent execution and returns control to the user.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

type: Literal["user.interrupt"]оВЪ

processed\_at: Optional[datetime]оВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: Optional[str]оВЪ

If absent, interrupts every non-archived thread in a multiagent session (or the primary alone in a single-agent session). If present, interrupts only the named thread.

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsUserToolConfirmationEvent: вА¶оВЪ

A tool confirmation event that approves or denies a pending tool execution.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

оА™

result: Literal["allow", "deny"]оВЪ

UserToolConfirmationResult enum

One of the following:

"allow"оВЪ

"deny"оВЪ

tool\_use\_id: strоВЪ

The id of the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: Literal["user.tool\_confirmation"]оВЪ

deny\_message: Optional[str]оВЪ

Optional message providing context for a 'deny' decision. Only allowed when result is 'deny'.

processed\_at: Optional[datetime]оВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

session\_thread\_id: Optional[str]оВЪ

When set, the confirmation routes to this subagent's thread rather than the primary. Echo this from the `session_thread_id` on the `agent.tool_use` or `agent.mcp_tool_use` event that prompted the approval.

оА™

Event sent by the client providing the result of a custom tool execution.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

custom\_tool\_use\_id: strоВЪ

The id of the `agent.custom_tool_use` event this result corresponds to, which can be found in the last `session.status_idle` [event's](api/beta/sessions/events/list.md) `stop_reason.event_ids` field.

type: Literal["user.custom\_tool\_result"]оВЪ

оА™

content: Optional[List[Content]]оВЪ

The result content returned by the tool.

citations: [BetaManagedAgentsSearchResultCitations](api/beta.md)оВЪ

Array of text content blocks from the search result.

source: strоВЪ

The URL source of the search result.

title: strоВЪ

The title of the search result.

type: Literal["search\_result"]оВЪ

Whether the tool execution resulted in an error.

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsAgentCustomToolUseEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Event emitted when the agent calls a custom tool. The session goes idle until the client sends a `user.custom_tool_result` event with the result.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

input: Dict[str, object]оВЪ

Input parameters for the tool call.

name: strоВЪ

Name of the custom tool being called.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: Literal["agent.custom\_tool\_use"]оВЪ

session\_thread\_id: Optional[str]оВЪ

When set, this event was cross-posted from a subagent's thread to surface its custom tool use on the primary thread's stream. Empty on the thread's own events. Echo this on a `user.custom_tool_result` event to route the result back.

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsAgentMCPToolUseEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Name of the MCP tool being used.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

оА™

"ask"оВЪ

"deny"оВЪ

class BetaManagedAgentsUnknownError: вА¶оВЪ

An unknown or unexpected error occurred during session execution. A fallback variant; clients that don't recognize a new error code can match on `retry_status` and `message` alone.

What the client should do next in response to this error.

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusRetrying: вА¶оВЪ

The server is retrying automatically. Client should wait; the same error type may fire again as retrying, then once as exhausted when the retry budget runs out.

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsRetryStatusExhausted: вА¶оВЪ

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationStartEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle begins.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: intоВЪ

0-indexed revision cycle. 0 is the first evaluation; 1 is the re-evaluation after the first revision; etc.

outcome\_id: strоВЪ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: Literal["span.outcome\_evaluation\_start"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationEndEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Emitted when an outcome evaluation cycle completes. Carries the verdict and aggregate token usage. A verdict of `needs_revision` means another evaluation cycle follows; `satisfied`, `max_iterations_reached`, `failed`, or `interrupted` are terminal вАФ no further evaluation cycles follow.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

explanation: strоВЪ

Human-readable explanation of the verdict. For `needs_revision`, describes which criteria failed and why.

iteration: intоВЪ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_evaluation\_start\_id: strоВЪ

The id of the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` event.

outcome\_id: strоВЪ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

result: strоВЪ

Evaluation verdict. 'satisfied': criteria met, session goes idle. 'needs\_revision': criteria not met, another revision cycle follows. 'max\_iterations\_reached': evaluation budget exhausted with criteria still unmet вАФ one final acknowledgment turn follows before the session goes idle, but no further evaluation runs. 'failed': grader determined the rubric does not apply to the deliverables. 'interrupted': user sent an interrupt while evaluation was in progress.

type: Literal["span.outcome\_evaluation\_end"]оВЪ

оА™

usage: [BetaManagedAgentsSpanModelUsage](api/beta.md)оВЪ

Token usage for a single model request.

cache\_creation\_input\_tokens: intоВЪ

Tokens used to create prompt cache in this request.

cache\_read\_input\_tokens: intоВЪ

Tokens read from prompt cache in this request.

input\_tokens: intоВЪ

Input tokens consumed by this request.

output\_tokens: intоВЪ

Output tokens generated by this request.

оА™

speed: Optional[Literal["standard", "fast"]]оВЪ

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

"standard"оВЪ

"fast"оВЪ

оА™

Input tokens consumed by this request.

Output tokens generated by this request.

speed: Optional[Literal["standard", "fast"]]оВЪ

Inference speed mode. `fast` provides significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Not all models support `fast`; invalid combinations are rejected at create time.

One of the following:

"standard"оВЪ

"fast"оВЪ

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: Literal["span.model\_request\_end"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSpanOutcomeEvaluationOngoingEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Periodic heartbeat emitted while an outcome evaluation cycle is in progress. Distinguishes 'evaluation is actively running' from 'evaluation is stuck' between the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start` and `span.outcome_evaluation_end` events.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

iteration: intоВЪ

0-indexed revision cycle, matching the corresponding `span.outcome_evaluation_start`.

outcome\_id: strоВЪ

The `outc_` ID of the outcome being evaluated.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: Literal["span.outcome\_evaluation\_ongoing"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsUserDefineOutcomeEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Echo of a `user.define_outcome` input event. Carries the server-generated `outcome_id` that subsequent `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events reference.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this event.

description: strоВЪ

What the agent should produce. Copied from the input event.

max\_iterations: Optional[int]оВЪ

Evaluate-then-revise cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

outcome\_id: strоВЪ

Server-generated `outc_` ID for this outcome. Referenced by `span.outcome_evaluation_*` events and the session's `outcome_evaluations` list.

processed\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

оА™

rubric: RubricоВЪ

Rubric for grading the quality of an outcome.

One of the following:

Emitted when an UpdateSession request changed at least one field. Carries only the fields that changed; absent fields were not part of the update. The new configuration applies from the next turn.

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

class BetaManagedAgentsAgentArchivedDeploymentPausedReasonError: вА¶оВЪ

The deployment's agent was archived.

type: Literal["agent\_archived\_error"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsCronSchedule: вА¶оВЪ

5-field POSIX cron schedule with computed runtime timestamps.

expression: strоВЪ

5-field POSIX cron expression: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week (e.g., "0 9 \* \* 1-5" for weekdays at 9am). Day-of-week is 0-7 where 0 and 7 both mean Sunday. Extended cron syntax - seconds or year fields, and the special characters L, W, #, and ? - is not supported, nor are predefined shortcuts (@daily).

timezone: strоВЪ

IANA timezone identifier (e.g., "America/Los\_Angeles", "UTC").

type: Literal["cron"]оВЪ

last\_run\_at: Optional[datetime]оВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

upcoming\_runs\_at: Optional[List[datetime]]оВЪ

Up to 5 timestamps of upcoming cron occurrences. Non-empty for active and paused deployments (reflects what the schedule would do if unpaused); empty once the deployment is archived (`archived_at` set). Each fire is offset by a small per-schedule jitter, so a run will actually start at or shortly after its listed time.

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsCronScheduleParams: вА¶оВЪ

5-field POSIX cron schedule. Literal wall-clock matching in the configured timezone.

expression: strоВЪ

5-field POSIX cron expression: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week (e.g., "0 9 \* \* 1-5" for weekdays at 9am). Day-of-week is 0-7 where 0 and 7 both mean Sunday. Extended cron syntax - seconds or year fields, and the special characters L, W, #, and ? - is not supported, nor are predefined shortcuts (@daily).

timezone: strоВЪ

Required. IANA timezone identifier (e.g., "America/Los\_Angeles", "UTC"). Validated against the IANA timezone database.

type: Literal["cron"]оВЪ

оА™

content: strоВЪ

Rubric content. Plain text or markdown вАФ the grader treats it as freeform text.

type: Literal["text"]оВЪ

type: Literal["user.define\_outcome"]оВЪ

max\_iterations: Optional[int]оВЪ

EvalвЖТrevision cycles before giving up. Default 3, max 20.

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsDeploymentSystemMessageEvent: вА¶оВЪ

Privileged context for the accompanying turn and all subsequent turns, appended to the session's system context as a `role: "system"` turn rather than replacing the top-level system prompt.

оА™

content: List[[BetaManagedAgentsSystemContentBlock](api/beta.md)]оВЪ

System content blocks to append. Text-only.

text: strоВЪ

The text content.

type: Literal["text"]оВЪ

type: Literal["system.message"]оВЪ

metadata: Dict[str, str]оВЪ

Arbitrary key-value metadata. Maximum 16 pairs.

name: strоВЪ

Human-readable name.

оА™

paused\_reason: Optional[BetaManagedAgentsDeploymentPausedReason]оВЪ

Why a deployment is paused. Non-null exactly when `status` is `paused`.

One of the following:

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsManualDeploymentPausedReason: вА¶оВЪ

The caller invoked the pause endpoint on the deployment.

type: Literal["manual"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsErrorDeploymentPausedReason: вА¶оВЪ

A scheduled fire recorded a failed run whose error auto-pauses the deployment.

оА™

error: [BetaManagedAgentsDeploymentPausedReasonError](api/beta.md)оВЪ

The error that triggered an auto-pause. Matches the failed run's `error.type`.

One of the following:

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsEnvironmentArchivedDeploymentPausedReasonError: вА¶оВЪ

The deployment's environment was archived.

type: Literal["environment\_archived\_error"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsAgentArchivedDeploymentPausedReasonError: вА¶оВЪ

The deployment's agent was archived.

type: Literal["agent\_archived\_error"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsEnvironmentNotFoundDeploymentPausedReasonError: вА¶оВЪ

The deployment's environment no longer exists.

type: Literal["environment\_not\_found\_error"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsVaultNotFoundDeploymentPausedReasonError: вА¶оВЪ

A vault referenced by the deployment no longer exists.

type: Literal["vault\_not\_found\_error"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsFileNotFoundDeploymentPausedReasonError: вА¶оВЪ

A file resource referenced by the deployment no longer exists.

type: Literal["file\_not\_found\_error"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionResourceNotFoundDeploymentPausedReasonError: вА¶оВЪ

A referenced resource no longer exists and its kind was not reported.

type: Literal["session\_resource\_not\_found\_error"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsWorkspaceArchivedDeploymentPausedReasonError: вА¶оВЪ

The deployment's workspace was archived.

type: Literal["workspace\_archived\_error"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsOrganizationDisabledDeploymentPausedReasonError: вА¶оВЪ

The deployment's organization is disabled.

type: Literal["organization\_disabled\_error"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreArchivedDeploymentPausedReasonError: вА¶оВЪ

A memory store referenced by the deployment is archived.

type: Literal["memory\_store\_archived\_error"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSkillNotFoundDeploymentPausedReasonError: вА¶оВЪ

A skill referenced by the deployment's agent no longer exists.

type: Literal["skill\_not\_found\_error"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsVaultArchivedDeploymentPausedReasonError: вА¶оВЪ

A vault referenced by the deployment is archived.

type: Literal["vault\_archived\_error"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsUnknownDeploymentPausedReasonError: вА¶оВЪ

An unrecognized error auto-paused the deployment. A fallback variant; matches a run whose `error.type` is `unknown_error`.

type: Literal["unknown\_error"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSelfHostedResourcesUnsupportedDeploymentPausedReasonError: вА¶оВЪ

The deployment configures resources, but its environment is self-hosted and cannot mount them.

type: Literal["self\_hosted\_resources\_unsupported\_error"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsMCPEgressBlockedDeploymentPausedReasonError: вА¶оВЪ

An MCP server host used by the deployment's agent is blocked by the environment's network policy.

type: Literal["mcp\_egress\_blocked\_error"]оВЪ

type: Literal["error"]оВЪ

оА™

resources: List[[BetaManagedAgentsSessionResourceConfig](api/beta.md)]оВЪ

Resources attached to sessions created from this deployment. Echoes the input minus write-only credentials.

One of the following:

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsGitHubRepositoryResourceConfig: вА¶оВЪ

A GitHub repository mounted into each session's container. The authorization token is write-only and never returned.

type: Literal["github\_repository"]оВЪ

url: strоВЪ

Github URL of the repository

оА™

checkout: Optional[Checkout]оВЪ

Branch or commit to check out. Defaults to the repository's default branch.

One of the following:

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsBranchCheckout: вА¶оВЪ

name: strоВЪ

Branch name to check out.

type: Literal["branch"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsCommitCheckout: вА¶оВЪ

sha: strоВЪ

Full commit SHA to check out.

type: Literal["commit"]оВЪ

mount\_path: Optional[str]оВЪ

Mount path in the container. Defaults to `/workspace/<repo-name>`.

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsFileResourceConfig: вА¶оВЪ

A file mounted into each session's container.

file\_id: strоВЪ

ID of a previously uploaded file.

type: Literal["file"]оВЪ

mount\_path: Optional[str]оВЪ

Mount path in the container. Defaults to `/mnt/session/uploads/<file_id>`.

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStoreResourceConfig: вА¶оВЪ

A memory store attached to each session created from this deployment.

memory\_store\_id: strоВЪ

The memory store ID (memstore\_...). Must belong to the caller's organization and workspace.

type: Literal["memory\_store"]оВЪ

оА™

access: Optional[Literal["read\_write", "read\_only"]]оВЪ

Access mode for an attached memory store.

One of the following:

"read\_write"оВЪ

"read\_only"оВЪ

instructions: Optional[str]оВЪ

Per-attachment guidance for the agent on how to use this store. Rendered into the memory section of the system prompt. Max 4096 chars.

оА™

schedule: Optional[BetaManagedAgentsSchedule]оВЪ

5-field POSIX cron schedule with computed runtime timestamps.

expression: strоВЪ

5-field POSIX cron expression: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week (e.g., "0 9 \* \* 1-5" for weekdays at 9am). Day-of-week is 0-7 where 0 and 7 both mean Sunday. Extended cron syntax - seconds or year fields, and the special characters L, W, #, and ? - is not supported, nor are predefined shortcuts (@daily).

timezone: strоВЪ

IANA timezone identifier (e.g., "America/Los\_Angeles", "UTC").

type: Literal["cron"]оВЪ

last\_run\_at: Optional[datetime]оВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

upcoming\_runs\_at: Optional[List[datetime]]оВЪ

Up to 5 timestamps of upcoming cron occurrences. Non-empty for active and paused deployments (reflects what the schedule would do if unpaused); empty once the deployment is archived (`archived_at` set). Each fire is offset by a small per-schedule jitter, so a run will actually start at or shortly after its listed time.

оА™

status: [BetaManagedAgentsDeploymentStatus](api/beta.md)оВЪ

Lifecycle status of a deployment.

One of the following:

"active"оВЪ

"paused"оВЪ

type: Literal["deployment"]оВЪ

updated\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

vault\_ids: List[str]оВЪ

Vault IDs supplying stored credentials for sessions created from this deployment.

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSystemMessageEventParams: вА¶оВЪ

Privileged context for the accompanying turn and all subsequent turns, appended to the session's system context as a `role: "system"` turn rather than replacing the top-level system prompt. At most one per request: it must be the final event and immediately follow the `user.message`, `user.tool_result`, or `user.custom_tool_result` it accompanies. Only supported on models that accept mid-conversation system messages.

оА™

text: strоВЪ

The text content.

type: Literal["text"]оВЪ

type: Literal["system.message"]оВЪ

class BetaManagedAgentsSchedule: вА¶оВЪ

5-field POSIX cron schedule with computed runtime timestamps.

expression: strоВЪ

5-field POSIX cron expression: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week (e.g., "0 9 \* \* 1-5" for weekdays at 9am). Day-of-week is 0-7 where 0 and 7 both mean Sunday. Extended cron syntax - seconds or year fields, and the special characters L, W, #, and ? - is not supported, nor are predefined shortcuts (@daily).

timezone: strоВЪ

IANA timezone identifier (e.g., "America/Los\_Angeles", "UTC").

type: Literal["cron"]оВЪ

last\_run\_at: Optional[datetime]оВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

upcoming\_runs\_at: Optional[List[datetime]]оВЪ

Up to 5 timestamps of upcoming cron occurrences. Non-empty for active and paused deployments (reflects what the schedule would do if unpaused); empty once the deployment is archived (`archived_at` set). Each fire is offset by a small per-schedule jitter, so a run will actually start at or shortly after its listed time.

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsScheduleParams: вА¶оВЪ

5-field POSIX cron schedule. Literal wall-clock matching in the configured timezone.

expression: strоВЪ

5-field POSIX cron expression: minute hour day-of-month month day-of-week (e.g., "0 9 \* \* 1-5" for weekdays at 9am). Day-of-week is 0-7 where 0 and 7 both mean Sunday. Extended cron syntax - seconds or year fields, and the special characters L, W, #, and ? - is not supported, nor are predefined shortcuts (@daily).

timezone: strоВЪ

Required. IANA timezone identifier (e.g., "America/Los\_Angeles", "UTC"). Validated against the IANA timezone database.

type: Literal["cron"]оВЪ

оА™

The secret is substituted on any host the session's Environment network policy permits egress to.

class BetaManagedAgentsLimitedCredentialNetworkingResponse: вА¶оВЪ

The secret is substituted only on requests to the listed hosts.

Hostnames on which the secret will be substituted. An entry matches the request host exactly; a `*.`-prefixed entry matches any subdomain of the named domain but not the domain itself.

[BetaManagedAgentsCredentialNetworkingParams](api/beta.md)оВЪ

class BetaManagedAgentsUnrestrictedCredentialNetworkingParams: вА¶оВЪ

Substitute the secret on any host the session's Environment network policy permits egress to. The Environment's network policy is the only boundary on where the secret can reach.

type: Literal["unrestricted"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsLimitedCredentialNetworkingParams: вА¶оВЪ

Substitute the secret only on requests to the listed hosts.

allowed\_hosts: List[str]оВЪ

Hostnames on which the secret will be substituted. Each entry is a bare hostname (`api.example.com`), an IPv4 address (`192.0.2.1`), or a `*.`-prefixed wildcard (`*.example.com`). URLs, ports, paths, and IPv6 addresses are not accepted. At most 16 entries.

type: Literal["limited"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsDeletedMemoryStore: вА¶оВЪ

Confirmation that a `memory_store` was deleted.

id: strоВЪ

ID of the deleted memory store (a `memstore_...` identifier). The store and all its memories and versions are no longer retrievable.

type: Literal["memory\_store\_deleted"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsMemoryStore: вА¶оВЪ

A `memory_store`: a named container for agent memories, scoped to a workspace. Attach a store to a session via `resources[]` to mount it as a directory the agent can read and write.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for the memory store (a `memstore_...` tagged ID). Use this when attaching the store to a session, or in the `{memory_store_id}` path parameter of subsequent calls.

created\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

name: strоВЪ

Human-readable name for the store. 1вАУ255 characters. The store's mount-path slug under `/mnt/memory/` is derived from this name.

type: Literal["memory\_store"]оВЪ

updated\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

archived\_at: Optional[datetime]оВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

description: Optional[str]оВЪ

Free-text description of what the store contains, up to 1024 characters. Included in the agent's system prompt when the store is attached, so word it to be useful to the agent. Empty string when unset.

metadata: Optional[Dict[str, str]]оВЪ

Arbitrary key-value tags for your own bookkeeping (such as the end user a store belongs to). Up to 16 pairs; keys 1вАУ64 characters; values up to 512 characters. Returned on retrieve/list but not filterable.

class BetaManagedAgentsConflictError: вА¶оВЪ

type: Literal["conflict\_error"]оВЪ

message: Optional[str]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsContentSha256Precondition: вА¶оВЪ

Optimistic-concurrency precondition: the update applies only if the memory's stored `content_sha256` equals the supplied value. On mismatch, the request returns `memory_precondition_failed_error` (HTTP 409); re-read the memory and retry against the fresh state. If the precondition fails but the stored state already exactly matches the requested `content` and `path`, the server returns 200 instead of 409.

type: Literal["content\_sha256"]оВЪ

content\_sha256: Optional[str]оВЪ

Expected `content_sha256` of the stored memory (64 lowercase hexadecimal characters). Typically the `content_sha256` returned by a prior read or list call. Because the server applies no content normalization, clients can also compute this locally as the SHA-256 of the UTF-8 content bytes.

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsDeletedMemory: вА¶оВЪ

Tombstone returned by [Delete a memory](api/beta/memory_stores/memories/delete.md). The memory's version history persists and remains listable via [List memory versions](api/beta/memory_stores/memory_versions/list.md) until the store itself is deleted.

id: strоВЪ

ID of the deleted memory (a `mem_...` value).

type: Literal["memory\_deleted"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsMemory: вА¶оВЪ

A `memory` object: a single text document at a hierarchical path inside a memory store. The `content` field is populated when `view=full` and `null` when `view=basic`; the `content_size_bytes` and `content_sha256` fields are always populated so sync clients can diff without fetching content. Memories are addressed by their `mem_...` ID; the path is the create key and can be changed via update.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this memory (a `mem_...` value). Stable across renames; use this ID, not the path, to read, update, or delete the memory.

content\_sha256: strоВЪ

Lowercase hex SHA-256 digest of the UTF-8 `content` bytes (64 characters). The server applies no normalization, so clients can compute the same hash locally for staleness checks and as the value for a `content_sha256` precondition on update. Always populated, regardless of `view`.

content\_size\_bytes: intоВЪ

Size of `content` in bytes (the UTF-8 plaintext length). Always populated, regardless of `view`.

created\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

memory\_store\_id: strоВЪ

ID of the memory store this memory belongs to (a `memstore_...` value).

memory\_version\_id: strоВЪ

ID of the `memory_version` representing this memory's current content (a `memver_...` value). This is the authoritative head pointer; `memory_version` objects do not carry an `is_latest` flag, so compare against this field instead. Enumerate the full history via [List memory versions](api/beta/memory_stores/memory_versions/list.md).

path: strоВЪ

Hierarchical path of the memory within the store, e.g. `/projects/foo/notes.md`. Always starts with `/`. Paths are case-sensitive and unique within a store. Maximum 1,024 bytes.

type: Literal["memory"]оВЪ

updated\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

content: Optional[str]оВЪ

The memory's UTF-8 text content. Populated when `view=full`; `null` when `view=basic`. Maximum 100 kB (102,400 bytes).

оА™

[BetaManagedAgentsMemoryListItem](api/beta.md)оВЪ

One item in a [List memories](api/beta/memory_stores/memories/list.md) response: either a `memory` object or, when `depth` is set, a `memory_prefix` rollup marker.

One of the following:

оА™

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsMemoryPrefix: вА¶оВЪ

A rolled-up directory marker returned by [List memories](api/beta/memory_stores/memories/list.md) when `depth` is set. Indicates that one or more memories exist deeper than the requested depth under this prefix. This is a list-time rollup, not a stored resource; it has no ID and no lifecycle. Each prefix counts toward the page `limit` and interleaves with `memory` items in path order.

path: strоВЪ

The rolled-up path prefix, including a trailing `/` (e.g. `/projects/foo/`). Pass this value as `path_prefix` on a subsequent list call to drill into the directory.

type: Literal["memory\_prefix"]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsMemoryPathConflictError: вА¶оВЪ

type: Literal["memory\_path\_conflict\_error"]оВЪ

conflicting\_memory\_id: Optional[str]оВЪ

conflicting\_path: Optional[str]оВЪ

message: Optional[str]оВЪ

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsMemoryPreconditionFailedError: вА¶оВЪ

type: Literal["memory\_precondition\_failed\_error"]оВЪ

message: Optional[str]оВЪ

class BetaManagedAgentsMemoryPrefix: вА¶оВЪ

A rolled-up directory marker returned by [List memories](api/beta/memory_stores/memories/list.md) when `depth` is set. Indicates that one or more memories exist deeper than the requested depth under this prefix. This is a list-time rollup, not a stored resource; it has no ID and no lifecycle. Each prefix counts toward the page `limit` and interleaves with `memory` items in path order.

path: strоВЪ

The rolled-up path prefix, including a trailing `/` (e.g. `/projects/foo/`). Pass this value as `path_prefix` on a subsequent list call to drill into the directory.

type: Literal["memory\_prefix"]оВЪ

оА™

Literal["basic", "full"]оВЪ

Selects which projection of a `memory` or `memory_version` the server returns. `basic` returns the object with `content` set to `null`; `full` populates `content`. When omitted, the default is endpoint-specific: retrieve operations default to `full`; list, create, and update operations default to `basic`. Listing with `view=full` caps `limit` at 20.

One of the following:

"basic"оВЪ

"full"оВЪ

оА™

Optimistic-concurrency precondition: the update applies only if the memory's stored `content_sha256` equals the supplied value. On mismatch, the request returns `memory_precondition_failed_error` (HTTP 409); re-read the memory and retry against the fresh state. If the precondition fails but the stored state already exactly matches the requested `content` and `path`, the server returns 200 instead of 409.

type: Literal["content\_sha256"]оВЪ

content\_sha256: Optional[str]оВЪ

Expected `content_sha256` of the stored memory (64 lowercase hexadecimal characters). Typically the `content_sha256` returned by a prior read or list call. Because the server applies no content normalization, clients can also compute this locally as the SHA-256 of the UTF-8 content bytes.

[BetaManagedAgentsActor](api/beta.md)оВЪ

Identifies who performed a write or redact operation. Captured at write time on the `memory_version` row. The API key that created a session is not recorded on agent writes; attribution answers who made the write, not who is ultimately responsible. Look up session provenance separately via the [Sessions API](api/sessions-retrieve.md).

One of the following:

оА™

class BetaManagedAgentsSessionActor: вА¶оВЪ

class BetaManagedAgentsMemoryVersion: вА¶оВЪ

A `memory_version` object: one immutable, attributed row in a memory's append-only history. Every non-no-op mutation to a memory produces a new version. Versions belong to the store (not the individual memory) and persist after the memory is deleted. Retrieving a redacted version returns 200 with `content`, `path`, `content_size_bytes`, and `content_sha256` set to `null`; branch on `redacted_at`, not HTTP status.

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this version (a `memver_...` value).

created\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

memory\_id: strоВЪ

ID of the memory this version snapshots (a `mem_...` value). Remains valid after the memory is deleted; pass it as `memory_id` to [List memory versions](api/beta/memory_stores/memory_versions/list.md) to retrieve the full lineage including the `deleted` row.

memory\_store\_id: strоВЪ

ID of the memory store this version belongs to (a `memstore_...` value).

оА™

operation: [BetaManagedAgentsMemoryVersionOperation](api/beta.md)оВЪ

The kind of mutation a `memory_version` records. Every non-no-op mutation to a memory appends exactly one version row with one of these values.

One of the following:

"created"оВЪ

"modified"оВЪ

"deleted"оВЪ

type: Literal["memory\_version"]оВЪ

content: Optional[str]оВЪ

The memory's UTF-8 text content as of this version. `null` when `view=basic`, when `operation` is `deleted`, or when `redacted_at` is set.

content\_sha256: Optional[str]оВЪ

Lowercase hex SHA-256 digest of `content` as of this version (64 characters). `null` when `redacted_at` is set or `operation` is `deleted`. Populated regardless of `view` otherwise.

content\_size\_bytes: Optional[int]оВЪ

Size of `content` in bytes as of this version. `null` when `redacted_at` is set or `operation` is `deleted`. Populated regardless of `view` otherwise.

оА™

created\_by: Optional[BetaManagedAgentsActor]оВЪ

Identifies who performed a write or redact operation. Captured at write time on the `memory_version` row. The API key that created a session is not recorded on agent writes; attribution answers who made the write, not who is ultimately responsible. Look up session provenance separately via the [Sessions API](api/sessions-retrieve.md).

One of the following:

class SkillCreateResponse: вА¶оВЪ

оА™

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for the skill.

The format and length of IDs may change over time.

created\_at: strоВЪ

ISO 8601 timestamp of when the skill was created.

оА™

display\_title: Optional[str]оВЪ

Display title for the skill.

This is a human-readable label that is not included in the prompt sent to the model.

оА™

latest\_version: Optional[str]оВЪ

The latest version identifier for the skill.

This represents the most recent version of the skill that has been created.

оА™

source: strоВЪ

Source of the skill.

This may be one of the following values:

- `"custom"`: the skill was created by a user
- `"anthropic"`: the skill was created by Anthropic

оА™

type: strоВЪ

Object type.

For Skills, this is always `"skill"`.

updated\_at: strоВЪ

ISO 8601 timestamp of when the skill was last updated.

class VersionCreateResponse: вА¶оВЪ

id: strоВЪ

ISO 8601 timestamp of when the skill version was created.

оА™

description: strоВЪ

Description of the skill version.

This is extracted from the SKILL.md file in the skill upload.

directory: strоВЪ

Directory name of the skill version.

This is the top-level directory name that was extracted from the uploaded files.

Human-readable name of the skill version.

type: strоВЪ

Object type.

For Skill Versions, this is always `"skill_version"`.

оА™

version: strоВЪ

Version identifier for the skill.

Each version is identified by a Unix epoch timestamp (e.g., "1759178010641129").

##### ModelsExpand Collapse

оА™

class BetaUserProfile: вА¶оВЪ

id: strоВЪ

Unique identifier for this user profile, prefixed `uprof_`.

created\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

metadata: Dict[str, str]оВЪ

Arbitrary key-value metadata. Maximum 16 pairs, keys up to 64 chars, values up to 512 chars.

оА™

relationship: Literal["external", "resold", "internal"]оВЪ

How the entity behind a user profile relates to the platform that owns the API key. `external`: an individual end-user of the platform. `resold`: a company the platform resells Claude access to. `internal`: the platform's own usage.

One of the following:

"external"оВЪ

"resold"оВЪ

"internal"оВЪ

оА™

trust\_grants: Dict[str, [BetaUserProfileTrustGrant](api/beta.md)]оВЪ

Trust grants for this profile, keyed by grant name. Key omitted when no grant is active or in flight.

оА™

status: Literal["active", "pending", "rejected"]оВЪ

Status of the trust grant.

One of the following:

"active"оВЪ

"pending"оВЪ

"rejected"оВЪ

type: Literal["user\_profile"]оВЪ

Object type. Always `user_profile`.

updated\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

external\_id: Optional[str]оВЪ

Platform's own identifier for this user. Not enforced unique.

name: Optional[str]оВЪ

Display name of the entity this profile represents. For `resold` this is the resold-to company's name.

оА™

class BetaUserProfileEnrollmentURL: вА¶оВЪ

expires\_at: datetimeоВЪ

A timestamp in RFC 3339 format

type: Literal["enrollment\_url"]оВЪ

Object type. Always `enrollment_url`.

url: strоВЪ

Enrollment URL to send to the end user. Valid until `expires_at`.

оА™

class BetaUserProfileTrustGrant: вА¶оВЪ

оА™

status: Literal["active", "pending", "rejected"]оВЪ

Status of the trust grant.

One of the following:

"active"оВЪ

#### BetaWebhooks

Helpers for receiving and verifying webhook events. Use `unwrap` in your SDK to verify signatures and parse payloads; see the [webhooks guide](managed-agents/webhooks.md) for handler examples.

Possible `data.type` values:

- `session.archived`
- `session.created`
- `session.deleted`
- `session.idled`
- `session.outcome_evaluation_ended`
- `session.pending`
- `session.requires_action`
- `session.running`
- `session.status_idled`
- `session.status_rescheduled`
- `session.status_run_started`
- `session.status_terminated`
- `session.thread_created`
- `session.thread_idled`
- `session.thread_terminated`
- `session.updated`
- `vault.archived`
- `vault.created`
- `vault.deleted`
- `vault_credential.archived`
- `vault_credential.created`
- `vault_credential.deleted`
- `vault_credential.refresh_failed`

##### ModelsExpand Collapse
